decision: Spike: headless ops agent via Claude Agent SDK

steps.action: Spike: headless ops agent via Claude Agent SDK
steps.notes: Spike complete. Three-phase recommendation: (1) claude -p headless CLI now — $0 marginal cost on Max sub, (2) Agent SDK service when persistent state needed, (3) MCP servers for direct Prometheus/Loki access. Brief at architect/briefs/spike-headless-ops-agent.md

Verified. Sound three-phase approach. Product recommendation: Phase 1 should be READ-ONLY diagnostic companion to defect-poller (detect vs investigate separation). Gate on verifying Max subscription rate limits for claude -p before building. Security scoping undersold — no Write/remediation tools until trust loop is established.
